nodes.label: T-CM-002: Brief scoring false positive corpus.  Validates that the scoring model
Ensure corpus has exactly 25 positive and 25 negative examples.
All flagged entries must have a severity; unflagged must not.
No corpus entry should have an empty field_value — that's a data error.
No two entries should have the same (field_key, field_value) pair.
HIGH severity must only appear on entries marked should_flag=True.
Non-flagged entries must cover at least 8 distinct field types.      This ensure
Flagged entries must include both HIGH and MEDIUM examples.      This validates
TBD' for budget must be HIGH severity — a known high-risk vague value.
A specific dollar amount for budget must not be flagged.
ASAP' for timeline must be HIGH severity — a known high-risk vague value.
Everyone' for target_audience must be HIGH — no segmentation is a red flag.
Modern' for style should flag as MEDIUM — vague but not completely empty.      T
Minimalist, similar to Apple or Muji' must NOT be flagged — it's specific.
Validates scoring model achieves >90% precision on the corpus.      Precision (f
Validates scoring model achieves >85% recall on flagged entries.      Recall = c
Tests for apps/ai/app/workers/score_brief_worker.py  Run with:     cd apps/ai &&
Worker source must pass py_compile with no SyntaxError.
When score >= threshold and no flags, autoHold is False and status is 'scored'.
When score < threshold, autoHold is True and status is 'clarification_needed'.
threshold from job_data overrides the default.
When fields list is empty, score is 0, autoHold is True, scorer is not called.
Tests for apps/ai/app/workers/parse_sow_worker.py  Run with:     cd apps/ai && p
Worker returns ok status and correct clause_count when parse succeeds.
Callback to /api/ai-callback/sow-parsed receives correct keys and clause array s
Each emitted clause has clauseType, originalText, summary, and sortOrder.
All emitted clauseType values are members of the allowed enum.
Job with no sow_id is skipped without calling parser or callback.
Job with raw_text shorter than minimum is skipped gracefully.
Empty raw_text skips gracefully without raising.
When SowParserService.parse raises, the worker re-raises for BullMQ retry.
The worker passes sow_id from job_data to callback unchanged — no server-side ws
Two jobs with distinct sow_ids each emit a separate callback with their own sowI
